title: Section 14
content: (1) Where, by any 1[Central Act] or Regulation made after the commencement of this Act, any power is conferred 2***, then 3[unless a different intention appears] that power may be exercised from time to time as occasion requires. (2) This section applies also to all 4[Central Acts] and Regulations made on or after the fourteenth day of January, 1887.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "Act of the Governor General in Council". 2. The words "on the Government" omitted by Act 18 of 1919, s. 2 and the First Schedule. 3. Ins. by Act 18 of 1919, s. 2 and the First Schedule. 4. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "Acts of the Governor General in Council".
